L

loadClients() - Static method in class com.fincredit.persistence.ClientFileManager
Loads clients from the file.
loadLoans() - Static method in class com.fincredit.persistence.LoanFileManager
Load the loans from the file.
Loan - Class in com.fincredit.model
Class representing a loan application, including details such as client ID, loan product, principal amount, terms, interest rate, monthly payment, amortization table, status, and evaluation result.
Loan(String, String, LoanProduct, double, int, double) - Constructor for class com.fincredit.model.Loan
 
Loan.Status - Enum Class in com.fincredit.model
 
LoanFileManager - Class in com.fincredit.persistence
LoanFileManager — Management of loan data in a text file (loans.txt).
LoanFileManager() - Constructor for class com.fincredit.persistence.LoanFileManager
 
LoanOfficer - Class in com.fincredit.model
Class representing a loan officer in the financial system, extending the Person class and including attributes specific to their role, such as branch affiliation and counts of approved and rejected loans.
LoanOfficer(String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.fincredit.model.LoanOfficer
 
LoanProduct - Class in com.fincredit.model
Abstract class representing a loan product, implementing the ILoanable interface and providing common functionality for calculating monthly payments and generating amortization tables.
LoanProductFactory - Class in com.fincredit.logic
The LoanProductFactory class is a singleton that manages the creation and retrieval of different loan products.
LoanRegistry - Class in com.fincredit.registry
LoanRegistry — Centralized management of clients and loans, implemented as a singleton to ensure a single instance throughout the application.
LoansPanel - Class in com.fincredit.gui
 
LoansPanel(CardLayout, JPanel) - Constructor for class com.fincredit.gui.LoansPanel
